synopsis: Who has captured whom on Zeltros? That's what everyone wants to know when three different civilizations invade that world! It's up to Luke Skywalker and the Hoojibs to save the day. If that weren't enough, Luke meets the villainous Toffs [sic] for the first time! "The Party's Over" is written by Jo Duffy and drawn by Cynthia Martin.
title: Star Wars (1977) #105: The Party's Over
